> [!IMPORTANT]
> **KlarPDF does not accept pull requests.** Only the maintainer and invited collaborators may open
> them; every other PR is closed automatically, unread. That is not a judgement on the change — see
> [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) for why.
>
> Found a bug, or want a feature? **[Open an issue](../issues/new/choose)** — issues are open to
> everyone and are the most useful thing you can send. Security problems go through
> [private vulnerability reporting](../security/advisories/new), never a public issue.

Collaborators: keep changes focused — one PR per logical unit — branched from an up-to-date main.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The headless test suite passes locally (`invoke test` / `pytest`).
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it made sense.
- [ ] I updated the docs where relevant (status → `PROGRESS.md`, design → `PLAN.md`,
      conventions → `CLAUDE.md`, shop window → `README.md`).
- [ ] My contribution is licensed under `AGPL-3.0-or-later` (the project licence).
